description: Public figure benchmark for evaluating whether deep Mayan Kin interpretations cover publicly observable life themes. This is a product-quality benchmark, not a scientific proof of destiny.
scoring_note: Scores measure overlap between generated expression tags and public biography themes. A score above 90 means the report is sufficiently specific for this benchmark.
